subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Us unto all them that dwell upon the earth: Worship none but God, the All-Powerful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی من علی الارض کلهم اجمعین ان لاتعبدوا الا الله المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @symbolism, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
